patterns.config_pattern: Config structs use serde Serialize/Deserialize, write to JSON with serde_json::to_string_pretty
patterns.doctor_checks: Use command_available() helper to check binaries, print ok/missing for each check
patterns.init_handler: Command::Init handler creates directories, writes config files, prints success messages
patterns.env_var_checks: Use std::env::var() to read environment variables, returns Result<String, VarError>

existing_implementations.description: Found existing doctor command that checks tools and adapters. Found existing init that creates .cards/ layout. Meta struct already has zellij_session field.

key_findings.doctor_exists: doctor.rs already implements most checks (nu, zellij, tools, adapters, .cards/ structure)
key_findings.meta_has_zellij: Meta struct in bop-core already has zellij_session and zellij_pane fields
key_findings.config_precedent: bop-core has Config struct for .bop/config.json with read/write helpers
key_findings.init_location: Init handler is in main.rs lines 391-414, uses paths::ensure_cards_layout()
key_findings.make_check: Makefile line 28: check = test + lint + check-fmt
